title: Treaty of Vontor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Treaty |relatedevents= |image= |name=Treaty of Vontor |conflict=[[Xim Wars]] |proposedby= |date=[[25,100 BBY]] |dissolved= |terms=Bondage of the [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]], [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], and [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodrans]] into the service of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] |side1=Hutts |side2=Klatooinians |side3=Nikto |side4=Vodrans |ppl1=[[Kossak Inijic Ar'durv|Kossak the Hutt]] |ppl2=[[Barada M'Beg]] |ppl3=[[D'we'mouk]] |ppl4=[[Kl'ieutu Mutela]] }} {{Quote|The protection of the Fountain was the key to the drawing of the Treaty of Vontor twenty-five thousand years ago. The Hutts swore to protect it. In return, our people and the Nikto swore eternal servitude. The Hutts did not protect the Fountain. If they do not act appropriately—''"
"''If they don't act appropriately, the deal's off, and the Hutts lose slaves they've had for twenty-five millennia. Okay. I think I see why everyone's so upset.''"
"''The Treaty states that if there is ever a question of violation, at least two, preferably more, offworlders must be present to render judgment, as both the Hutts and the Klatooinians have decided interests in the outcome.|[[Darima Kedari]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]''}} The '''Treaty of Vontor''' was signed by representatives of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] and the three races of the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]]: the [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]] under [[Barada M'Beg]], the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] under [[D'we'mouk]], and the [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodrans]] under [[Kl'ieutu Mutela]]. These three races had already, together with [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] soldiers, formed the backbone of the armies [[Kossak Inijic Ar'durv|Kossak the Hutt]] had recruited to defeat [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] at the [[Third Battle of Vontor]] during the [[Xim Wars]]. After the Hutt victory, the Si'Klaata Cluster was part of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], and the Treaty of Vontor put its three native races in a state of permanent servitude towards the Hutts. In [[44 ABY]], after the [[Lost Tribe of Sith|Sith of the Lost Tribe]] desecrated the [[Fountain of Ancients]] on [[Klatooine/Legends|Klatooine]], which the Hutts had promised to protect, the Klatooinians declared the Treaty of Vontor null and void, ending a slavery which had lasted for over 25 millennia. {{Stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Allies (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Ascension]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Ascension (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *{{InsiderCite|134|Getaway|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' {{Imo}} *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] *{{GamerCite|6|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Nikto}} {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}} {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Annual 2011]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Dangerous Covenants]]'' *''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Vertrag von Vontor |es=Tratado de Vontor |ka=ვონტორის შეთანხმება |pl=Traktat Vontorski }} [[Category:Hutt culture]] [[Category:Hutt Empire laws and acts]] [[Category:Klatooinian culture]] [[Category:Nikto culture]] [[Category:Pre-Republic]] [[Category:Treaties]] [[Category:Vodran culture]]
